prompt: A highly realistic scene of a tailor workshop where a mannequin is wearing an extremely over-tailored suit with excessive stitching, perfectly tight and overly detailed. Next to it, a real person struggles to wear a similar suit that does not fit properly and looks uncomfortable, with slight tearing and tightness visible. The environment is natural and physical, with sewing tools, fabric, and workshop details. No text, no labels. Cinematic lighting, realistic, high detail, photograph style.
metaphor: A suit perfectly tailored to a mannequin but failing to fit a real person represents a model overfitting training data but failing on new data.
